# Contract Lifecycle Engine

> Contract obligation tracking and deadline management via AI-powered extraction.

## What This Does

The Contract Lifecycle Engine ingests business contracts, extracts legally binding obligations using AI analysis (via the Multi-Agent RAG Platform), and proactively tracks deadlines to prevent costly auto-renewals, missed payment windows, and compliance breaches. It serves mid-market companies managing 200-500+ active contracts.

This is a headless REST API system — no frontend UI. All interaction via API or ecosystem event flow.

## Who It's For

- Legal operations teams at mid-market companies ($10M-$100M revenue)
- COOs and General Counsels managing vendor/customer contracts
- AI agents consuming the API for contract intelligence

## Tech Stack

- C# 12 / .NET 8 with ASP.NET Core 8 Minimal APIs
- Entity Framework Core 8 with PostgreSQL 16
- Quartz.NET for scheduled background jobs
- NATS JetStream for event publishing
- Docker on Hetzner VPS

## Repository

https://github.com/kingsleyonoh/contract-lifecycle-engine

## Getting Started

```bash
git clone https://github.com/kingsleyonoh/contract-lifecycle-engine.git
cd contract-lifecycle-engine
cp .env.example .env
docker compose up -d db
dotnet ef database update --project src/ContractEngine.Infrastructure --startup-project src/ContractEngine.Api
dotnet run --project src/ContractEngine.Api -- --seed
```

## API Surface

| Method | Path | Purpose |
|--------|------|---------|
| POST | /api/tenants/register | Register a new tenant |
| GET | /api/tenants/me | Get current tenant info |
| POST | /api/contracts | Create a contract |
| GET | /api/contracts | List contracts (filtered) |
| POST | /api/contracts/{id}/activate | Activate a draft contract |
| POST | /api/contracts/{id}/documents | Upload contract document |
| POST | /api/contracts/{id}/extract | Trigger AI obligation extraction |
| GET | /api/obligations | List obligations (filtered) |
| POST | /api/obligations/{id}/confirm | Confirm extracted obligation |
| POST | /api/obligations/{id}/fulfill | Mark obligation fulfilled |
| GET | /api/alerts | List deadline alerts |
| GET | /api/analytics/dashboard | Dashboard metrics |
| GET | /health | Health check |

## Ecosystem Integrations

All integrations are feature-flagged and optional:
- **RAG Platform** — AI-powered obligation extraction and semantic contract diff
- **Notification Hub** — Email/Telegram deadline alerts
- **Webhook Engine** — DocuSign/PandaDoc signed contract ingestion
- **Workflow Engine** — Contract amendment approval workflows
- **Compliance Ledger** — NATS events for regulatory audit trail
- **Invoice Recon** — Auto-create purchase orders from payment obligations
